title: archidendron dalatense
intro: Archidendron dalatense, also known as Dalat ebony, is a species of legume in the family Fabaceae. It is a plant native to Vietnam, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Archidendron dalatense include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Archidendron dalatense typically involve the plant's leaves and roots being boiled or infused in water to create a medicinal tea or decoction.
